== Unlimited ==
This setting uses more weapons, and would normally be played with either [[Liero 1.0]] or [[Liero 1.11]]. Liero 1.11 is usually chosen because of the anti-lag features of it. This setting is played with 100% [[Loading Time]].

=== Weapon List ===
* Bazooka
* Big Nuke
* Blaster
* Cannon
* Chaingun
* Chiquita Bomb
* Cluster Bomb
* Dart
* Doomsday
* Explosives
* Flamer
* Guass Gun
* Handgun
* Larpa
* Laser
* Mini Nuke
* Mini Rockets
* Napalm
* Shotgun
* Super Shotgun
* Uzi
* Winchester

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<tr>
<th class="MainPageBG" style="margin:0; background: #EFEFE6; font-size:100%; font-weight:bold; border:1px solid #D5D2D2; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;" width="100%"> <center>Popular Mods</center>
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: white; color:#000; margin:0; border:1px solid #a3bfb1; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;"> <center>   [[Liero 1.0]] | [[Liero 1.11]] | [[Modern Warfare]] | [[Cruel]] | [[8-Bit Warfare]] | [[Food Fight]] | [[WH40k]] | [[MSF]] | [[Trick or Treat]]   </center>
</td></tr></table>
<p><br/>
</p>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>

[[Category:Mods]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721122428/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Unlimited -->
